item.title: Cloudera Flow Management 2.1.7 Service Pack 4 for Cloudera Data Platform 7.1.9 and 7.3.1
item.description: The Data in Motion team is pleased to announce the release of Cloudera Flow Management 2.1.7 Service Pack 4. This release is based on Apache NiFi 1.28.1 and supports Cloudera on-premises 7.1.9 (all service packs) and Cloudera on-premises 7.3.1 (all service packs).

item.title: Cloudera Data Services On Premises 1.5.5 SP3 Release
item.description: Cloudera is pleased to announce the release of Cloudera Data Services on premises 1.5.5 SP3.

item.title: Day 1: Claude Code
item.description: First day with Claude Code on the MacBook — install, a few questions about my DesktopShare repo, and a commit + push, end to end from the terminal.

item.title: Cloudera Data Lineage Custom Lineage Connector Relaunch
item.description: Executive Summary The Cloudera Data Lineage team is pleased to announce that we’ve enhanced the Custom Lineage Connector (F.K.A Universal Connector) to support inner system lineage and transformations. This update effectively closes the visibility gap for source systems we don’t natively support yet.

item.title: NiFi Kafka Flink Kubernetes with Gemini and Grok
item.description: AI dump of markdown discussing top 10 kubernetes technologies in terms of nifi kafka and flink as operators.

item.title: How To Install NiFi Registry on Kubernetes with CFM Operator
item.description: A quick how to guide for installing NiFi Registry on minikube with the CFM Operator

item.title: Cloudera Flow Management Operator for Kubernetes 3.1
item.description: The Data In Motion Team is pleased to announce the release of Cloudera Flow Management Operator for Kubernetes version 3.1. This release introduces powerful new security and automation features, focusing on programmatic identity and access management, automated certificate generation, and intelligent cluster lifecycle enhancements that significantly reduce admin overhead and streamline user onboarding.

item.title: How To Install Cloudera Iceberg MCP Server
item.description: How to build and locally test the Cloudera Iceberg MCP Server with MCP Inspector using Cloudera Apache Iceberg deployed on AWS in a Cloudera Data Warehouse.

item.title: Cloudera Data Flow 3.1 for Cloudera on Cloud
item.description: The Data In Motion Team is pleased to announce the release of Cloudera Data Flow 3.1 for Cloudera on cloud.

item.title: How To Install Cloudera NiFi MCP Server
item.description: How to build and locally test the Cloudera NiFi MCP Server with MCP Inspector using Cloudera Apache NiFi deployed on AWS in a Data.
